/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -Wl,--enable-new-dtags CMakeFiles/sunset.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sunset.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sunset.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sunset.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sunset.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sunset.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_impl_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sunset.dir/src/vendor/imgui/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer3.cpp.o -o sunset  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libSDL3.so
